label: Foundations
description: Files every repo gets. Locked on.

label: Documentation
description: Optional docs scaffolding (ARCHITECTURE, CONTRIBUTING, ADRs, CHANGELOG).

label: GitHub remote
description: Create the repo on GitHub, apply labels, apply baseline branch protection.

label: Agent workflow
description: Capabilities that AI agents use during PR work. Pairs with AGENTS.md contract sections.

label: PR contract bundle
description: Reusable workflows that enforce PR title, body, branch naming, and policy.

label: Copilot / Pro tier (v0.4)
description: Copilot enablement and Actions secrets. Hidden until v0.4.
